title: heterotheca rudis
intro: Heterotheca rudis, also known as gray horse-gentian or gray false goldeneye, is a flowering plant native to the United States, particularly in the central and western regions. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help soothe wounds and reduce swelling. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever and alleviating respiratory issues, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. Heterotheca rudis is often prepared as a tea or infusion, and can also be used in salves and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
